system.notes:
Abilities

  • Lightning Strike: Once per Combat Turn, the thunderbird can use its Lightning Strike attack. This is a ranged attack, with a range of 30/75/150m.
  • Swift: The thunderbird can take the Run action as a Minor Action, and the Move Action as a Free action (but can still only take each once per Combat Turn). The thunderbird does not suffer Liability on tests when they take the Run action.

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Vision Magnification:
  • Dual Natured: The thunderbird always exists on both
  • the astral and physical planes, and can interact with:
  • anything on either plane. Their Armor applies to:
  • attacks from both the physical and astral planes.:
